description: Cancer biomarker testing results. Note that EGFR should only refer to an EGFR mutation, not estimated GFR (which is kidney function).

items.name: Biomarker Type
items.description: Type of biomarker assay (e.g., mutation, rearrangement, expression, amplification)

items.name: Biomarker Tested
items.description: Name of the biomarker tested (e.g., EGFR, ALK, ROS1, PD-L1, TTF-1, p40, KRAS, HER2, BRAF, RET, MET, NTRK)

items.name: Biomarker Result
items.description: Result of the biomarker test (e.g., positive, negative, 60%, L858R mutant, CD74-ROS1 fusion)
